## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #NN -->

## Change type

- [ ] Firmware behavior (motor / BLE) — **hardware-tested**
- [ ] UI / display / text
- [ ] Build / tooling / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `idf.py build` succeeds
- [ ] Motor/BLE changes tested on real hardware (if applicable)
- [ ] Firmware version bumped + `CHANGELOG.md` entry added (for functional changes)
- [ ] New first-party files carry the Apache-2.0 SPDX header
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO): `git commit -s`
